title: Peruvian Beef Stew
description: A hearty beef stew infused with the bold flavors of Peruvian cuisine. Perfect for a cold evening meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from pot and set aside.
Add Peruvian tender, onions, cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Cook until onions are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add beef broth and bring to a boil.
Return beef to pot and reduce heat to low.
Simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours or until beef is tender.
Stir in cheese and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
